_readme: AI-Prowler — Claude Desktop MCP Configuration Reference
IMPORTANT: The AI-Prowler installer writes this entry automatically.
Use the 'Auto-configure Claude Desktop' button in Settings -> MCP to
apply the correct config in one click — no manual editing needed.
Only edit this file manually if:
- The installer failed to configure Claude Desktop
- You installed Claude Desktop AFTER installing AI-Prowler
- You need to repair a broken entry
TRANSPORT: Claude Desktop uses STDIO (local process, no internet required).
- AI-Prowler is launched as a subprocess of Claude Desktop
DO NOT paste the 'AI-Prowler-Remote' HTTP snippet here.
That entry is for Claude.ai web/mobile ONLY (requires HTTP server + tunnel).
If you accidentally did this, click 'Auto-configure Claude Desktop' to fix it.
To manually apply: copy the 'mcpServers' block below into:

_note: Replace YOUR_USERNAME with your actual Windows username.
Or use the 'Auto-configure Claude Desktop' button in AI-Prowler
Settings -> MCP — it fills in the correct paths automatically.

_transport_summary.Claude Desktop: stdio — local subprocess, no network or HTTP server required
_transport_summary.Claude.ai web or mobile: HTTP via Cloudflare Tunnel — requires HTTP MCP server running + tunnel active

_tools_exposed: how_to_use_ai_prowler        - call first: recommended tool sequence and key facts
check_status                 - ChromaDB health, chunk count, tracked directories, DB path
get_knowledge_base_overview  - high-level summary of all indexed documents and topics
search_documents             - PRIMARY retrieval: semantic search returning raw document chunks
search_by_multiple_queries   - parallel search across multiple phrasings, auto-deduplicated
get_chunk_context            - expand context around a specific chunk (neighboring paragraphs)
get_document_chunks          - read a whole document sequentially by chunk index
list_indexed_documents       - browse indexed files, filterable by extension or path
get_database_stats           - total chunks, unique documents, breakdown by file type
add_and_index_directory      - index all files in a folder, optionally add to auto-update tracking
update_tracked_directories   - re-scan tracked folders, re-index only changed files
list_tracked_directories     - list all folders registered for auto-update
remove_directory             - remove a folder from tracking and delete its chunks from the index
_note_no_ollama: AI-Prowler v4.0+ is pure Agentic RAG — no Ollama or local LLM required.
Claude receives raw document chunks directly and synthesizes answers itself.
All Ollama/local-LLM MCP tools have been removed.
